sketches.title: North Country Greeting
sketches.caption: Dorothy and Toto on the first morning in Oz.

sketches.title: Field Knots Study
sketches.caption: A rough sketch of straw ties and pole lashings.

sketches.title: Orchard Turning
sketches.caption: Companions choosing a side path by the orchard.

sketches.title: Tin Polish Study
sketches.caption: Oiled joints and careful valve order notes.

sketches.title: Lion Roar Echo
sketches.caption: A trembling roar crossing the trees.

sketches.title: Forest Road Ink
sketches.caption: Road marks and tree shadows toward the city.

sketches.title: Kalidah Bridge Break
sketches.caption: The fallen tree over the gulf with beasts closing in.

sketches.title: Ravine Split
sketches.caption: A quick axe stroke sends the trunk down behind the party.

sketches.title: Poppy Sea Trail
sketches.caption: A wavering road through scarlet flowers and sleep-heavy air.

sketches.title: Field Mice Harness
sketches.caption: Thread lines and tiny teams prepared for rescue labor.
sketches.unlockRule: Accept aid from the Queen of the Field Mice

sketches.title: Audience with the Queen
sketches.caption: Dorothy thanks the Queen as scouts race through grass.

sketches.title: Lion Drawn by Mice
sketches.caption: Many mice pull together to move the sleeping Lion.
sketches.unlockRule: Complete poppy rescue with Lion recovered

sketches.title: Emerald Gates, Distant
sketches.caption: The city walls gleam at the end of the yellow road.

sketches.title: The Gate Guardian
sketches.caption: The green-bearded Guardian records each petition at the city gate.
sketches.unlockRule: Complete Guardian of the Gates chapter

sketches.title: Green Spectacles
sketches.caption: Locked lenses and careful straps before city entry.

sketches.title: City Glimmer
sketches.caption: First look down the bright green streets within the walls.

sketches.title: Palace Approach
sketches.caption: The companions wait in order for their first audience request.

sketches.title: Road's End
sketches.caption: The long road narrows at the gate of the city.

sketches.title: Hall of Audience
sketches.caption: A long green hall where petitions are called one by one.
sketches.unlockRule: Enter the palace waiting protocol chapter

sketches.title: Four Requests
sketches.caption: The four companions' wishes copied into a single ledger line.

sketches.title: Wonders Behind the Curtain
sketches.caption: Shifting symbols and changing forms inside the audience chamber.

sketches.title: A Promise Made
sketches.caption: Dorothy and companions swear to hold together on the westward task.

sketches.title: Westward Oath
sketches.caption: The quest card sealed with four names and one road.

sketches.title: Green Spectacles Close-Up
sketches.caption: Lock, clasp, and rim details before another palace crossing.

sketches.title: Westward Road
sketches.caption: Quest-card directions traced beside the long western road.

sketches.title: Winkie Hills
sketches.caption: Yellow ridges and sparse watch-fires in the western country.

sketches.title: Watching Presence
sketches.caption: An inked sweep crossing ridges where no figure is seen.

sketches.title: Hidden Hollow
sketches.caption: Stone banks and low brush that hide the party from scouts.
sketches.unlockRule: Complete optional Hidden Hollow side node

sketches.title: Ink-Swirl Glyph
sketches.caption: A patterned glyph copied after evading the western sweep perfectly.
sketches.unlockRule: Perfect Shadow of the West run

sketches.title: Lion's Resolve
sketches.caption: The Lion plants his paws and promises not to break formation.

sketches.title: Tin's Footsteps
sketches.caption: Even, measured steps cut across dust as the march turns west.

sketches.title: Scarecrow's Plan
sketches.caption: Quick lane marks showing where to hide between sweeps.

sketches.title: Golden Cap
sketches.caption: Cap rim and script marks copied in haste inside the hold.
sketches.unlockRule: Acquire the Golden Cap in story

sketches.title: Winged Monkeys
sketches.caption: Swift figures descending under a lawful cap command.
sketches.unlockRule: Use the first Golden Cap command

sketches.title: Western Hold
sketches.caption: Tall walls, narrow courts, and guarded western gates.

sketches.title: Quiet Plan
sketches.caption: Short route notes hidden in work ledgers and dust marks.

sketches.title: Servants of Winkie Country
sketches.caption: Winkie workers exchanging brief signs of help.

sketches.title: Latch and Token
sketches.caption: Three latch tokens marked beside a narrow exit mechanism.
sketches.unlockRule: Complete command carry moment or token latch node

sketches.title: A Narrow Corridor
sketches.caption: A tight corridor where one wrong turn would raise alarm.

sketches.title: Hands Unbound
sketches.caption: Companions regrouped after breaking clear of the hold.

sketches.title: Ink Shadow Swell
sketches.caption: Layered swells and lane marks traced during the western confrontation.

sketches.title: A Bowl of Water
sketches.caption: A simple bowl and spill line noted before the decisive moment.

sketches.title: Quiet Courage
sketches.caption: Dorothy keeps her hands steady while companions hold their line.
sketches.unlockRule: Choose the steady option in the Pack #8 opening beat

sketches.title: Winkie Lanterns
sketches.caption: Lantern rows lit in thanks after the western hold is freed.

sketches.title: Freedom Banner
sketches.caption: A simple cloth sign raised by Winkies after liberation.

sketches.title: Road Back East
sketches.caption: A long roadline turning from western ridges toward the city.
sketches.unlockRule: Set Return to Emerald City objective

sketches.title: Silver Road Turning
sketches.caption: Trail marks and shoeprints where the party turns toward Emerald City.
sketches.unlockRule: Reach silver road turning reward node

sketches.title: A Promise Kept
sketches.caption: Companions step out together after finishing the westward charge.

sketches.title: Back to the Green City
sketches.caption: Dorothy and companions return through the city gates in measured lines.

sketches.title: A Plain Man's Tale
sketches.caption: A quiet chamber sketch marking the Wizard's ordinary confession.

sketches.title: Token of Brains
sketches.caption: A symbolic emblem recorded beside Scarecrow's notes.

sketches.title: Token of Heart
sketches.caption: A polished token set next to Tin Woodman's care ledger.

sketches.title: Token of Courage
sketches.caption: A marked token noted after the Lion's ceremony.

sketches.title: Rigging Lines
sketches.caption: Rope geometry and knot order copied from balloon prep.

sketches.title: Wind Vane
sketches.caption: A vane angle sketch used to judge launch direction.

sketches.title: Departure Missed
sketches.caption: A final line showing the balloon lifting while Dorothy remains below.
